evals.name: new-pom-java25-payments
evals.prompt: Hey - kicking off a new microservice 'payments-orchestrator' (groupId com.acme.payments, Java 25, latest spring boot). Can you generate the pom.xml? It needs spring-boot-starter-web, actuator, validation, and we'll be using lombok and mapstruct. Tests: spring-boot-starter-test plus assertj and wiremock. Drop it in the project root.
evals.expected_output: A complete pom.xml at the repo root respecting all skill rules: versions only in <properties>+<dependencyManagement>, plugin versions only in properties, all required plugins present, AOT execution under spring-boot-maven-plugin (Java 25), dependencies grouped 1-5.

evals.name: add-resilience4j-dependency
evals.prompt: Need to add resilience4j-spring-boot3 to our service. Latest stable. The pom.xml is already in the repo root. Make sure it goes in the right place.
evals.expected_output: Adds resilience4j-spring-boot3 to <dependencies> in the third-party runtime group, adds a <resilience4j.version> property, adds a <dependencyManagement> entry referencing the property. No inline <version> in the <dependencies> entry.

evals.name: configure-spotless-plugin
evals.prompt: Our existing pom has no spotless plugin yet — please add it so that running `mvn validate` auto-formats the Java code with google-java-format. pom.xml is at repo root.
evals.expected_output: Adds spotless-maven-plugin to <build><plugins>, with version referenced as ${spotless.version} (property added under <properties>), googleJavaFormat config, execution bound to validate phase with goal apply.
